sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.description: Primary presenting complaint in the patient's own words

sections.title: History of Present Illness
sections.description: Onset, duration, character, radiation, associated symptoms, timing, exacerbating/relieving factors, severity

sections.title: Vital Signs
sections.description: Vital signs as observed on monitor or stated by physician

sections.title: Physical Examination
sections.description: Inspection, palpation, auscultation, percussion findings as observed during examination

sections.title: Investigations
sections.description: Lab results, ECG findings, imaging — as stated or shown on screen

sections.title: Assessment
sections.description: Clinical assessment as stated by the physician — diagnosis or working diagnosis explicitly stated

sections.title: Disposition
sections.description: Discharge plan, admission decision, referrals, follow-up instructions as stated by physician
